title: Protocol collection: Dissociation and FACS isolation of embryonic and post-embryonic C. elegans intestine cells for RNA-seq analysis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2pbsv","text":"This is a collection of protocols for the isolation of C. elegans intestine cells through FACS from embryo, L1, and L3 stage . The protocols are focused on collecting material for RNA-seq analysis, but could be utilized for other biochemical assays. Troubleshooting suggestions are listed at key steps of the protocols.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":55,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2ljrs","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c6fru","text":"To perform this experiment, perform the protocols in the following order:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"59udv","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3atr9","text":"1.
